cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Richard could have gone to the bakery. The question says the bakery was closed after 7pm, so we need to find the time before 7pm when he wasn't doing any of the other activities mentioned. First, let's list out all the times Richard was seen doing things: - Woke up at 8am. So he's awake from 8am onwards. That means from 8am, he's up and moving around. But the options include 8am to 9am as an option (D). - Betty saw him at the library from 9am to 2pm. So that's 9am to 2pm. So he can't go to the bakery during that time because he was reading at the library. - David saw him at the electronic store from 2pm to 4pm, fixing the computer. So from 2pm to 4pm he's busy there. So no bakery then. - Mary saw him near the Eiffel Tower from 4pm to 5pm, taking photos. So that's between 4 and 5pm. - Hannah saw him on a rooftop from 5pm to 6pm. So from 5 to 6pm he's there. - Susan saw him driving to the water park from 6pm to 7pm. So during that hour, he's driving there. The bakery is closed after 7pm, so the latest possible time he could go is before 7pm. He can't go during the time he was seen doing other things. So let's check the time gaps between his activities. From waking up at 8am until 9am, there's a possible window. He woke up at 8am and was at the library from 9am. So between 8am and 9am, what was he doing? The problem doesn't say. So he could have gone to the bakery then. That's option D. Then, after 9am until 2pm, he was at the library. So no bakery there (that's option B, which is when he was at the library, so not possible). Then, between 2pm and 4pm at the electronic store (option A is 6-7pm, which is when he was driving; option C is 5-6pm, when he was on a rooftop). So the only time not accounted for is between 8am and 9am. So option D is the possible time he could have gone to the bakery. Let me double-check: - 8am to 9am: No reported activity. Possible bakery time. - 9am to 2pm: Library. Can't be at bakery. - 2pm to 4pm: Electronic store. Can't be at bakery. - 4pm to 5pm: Eiffel Tower. Can't be at bakery. - 5pm to 6pm: Rooftop. Can't be at bakery. - 6pm to 7pm: Driving to water
